Brian T. Bonney, esq. (925-734-0990) of Clapp Moroney Vucinich Beeman Scheley for Defendant M Sqaured Construction.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant M Sqaured Construction'S Motion For Order Staying Action Due To Defendant PG & E Automatic Stay And Bankruptcy, Vacating Trial Date And Setting Status Conference, Supporting Declaration Of Brian T. Bonney, Esq. (Per Dept. 206 On 2/20/19).

Defendant M Squared Construction, Inc.'s motion, in which cross-defendant Ronan Construction, Inc. joined, for an order staying the action due to defendant PG&E's automatic stay in bankruptcy is granted in part. The trial date of March 18, 2019 shall be vacated and the action shall be temporarily stayed pending the decision of the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the Northern District of California, San Francisco Division on PG&E's motion for preliminary injunction as to actions against non-debtors.

Counsel for Defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.
